scope: governed return path for queued S02 semantic review terminals
problem_closed: review_queue.jsonl previously had no consumer capable of returning a pre-package S02 review to the pipeline

authority_contract.model_qc_preserved: the original model ratio and model_qc_passed=false remain in silhouette_metrics.json
authority_contract.confirmed_valid: requires the byte-identical queued model mask
authority_contract.corrected: requires a pixel-different native strict binary mask

fail_closed_checks: exactly one queued S02 needs_review record
native-size mode-L PNG with only 0/255 pixels
nonempty mask wholly inside the S01 context crop
fresh BiRefNet rerun reproduces the reviewed base mask SHA-256
resolution config hash matches the fresh stage config
stored reviewed mask hash remains unchanged
cache_lifecycle: a sealed resolution forces cached S02 exactly until the matching resolution is reflected in the atomic stage output

operator_handoff.panels: two local source-versus-red-overlay PNGs visually inspected for correct person alignment
operator_handoff.publication_policy: source-containing panel PNGs are git-ignored; only the JSON index, immutable hashes, paths, and command hints are published

verification.split_note: the second split's sole raw-writer-policy failure was corrected and rerun successfully; every collected test has a passing result

live_status.interpretation: the return path is ready, but neither live mask is approved or corrected because that semantic review belongs to Kevin
